mdRecord.dcterms:title: May Queen and Court - 1931
mdRecord.dcterms:description: 966_May Day At Marion Front row: Anderson,Eleanor Keiser, Dorothea Preston, Mary Snider, Mildred Lewis, Marie Killinger,Betty Back row: Freeda Boyd, Virginia Atins, Goldie Sheffey, Josephine Cassell, Rebekah Greever, Elizabeth Tise, Marguerite Anschuetz, Irma
